title: Dendrorkis setifera

taxonomy: Dendrorkis setifera is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is a member of the subtribe Orchidinae and the genus Dendrochilus. Further, it is placed in the tribe Dendrobieae, which consists of epiphytic orchids. The species is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Africa. Dendrorkis setifera is a type of terrestrial orchid with unique growth habits and adaptations.
